discussion_rounds:
Okay, after reviewing the proposals, I think Proposal B (offering 30 ZUP) is the stronger starting point. While my initial reasoning was to start high to gauge Player BLUE's willingness to pay, starting lower gives us more room to negotiate upwards and potentially reach a deal closer to our production cost of 40 ZUP. It's a more strategic approach.
